# speed(to:duration:)

**Type Method**

Creates an action that changes how fast the node executes actions.

## Declaration

```swift
class func speed(to speed: CGFloat, duration: TimeInterval) -> SKAction
```

## Parameters

- **speed**: The new value for the node’s speed.
- **duration**: The duration of the animation.

## Return Value

A new action object.

## Discussion

When the action executes, the node’s [doc://com.apple.spritekit/documentation/SpriteKit/SKNode/speed] property animates to the new value.

This action is not reversible; the reverse of this action has the same duration but does not change anything.

## Controlling the Action’s Speed

- **speed(by:duration:)**: Creates an action that changes how fast the node executes actions by a relative value.
